title: OmniFormatter Swift / Objective-C / Objective-C++ Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for Apple platform languages.

swift__statementTerminator.description: [Swift] Semicolons are optional and strongly discouraged.

swift__braceStyle.description: [Swift] Opening brace on same line (K&R, SE-0001).

swift__argumentLabelStyle.description: [Swift] Argument labels are mandatory at call sites unless suppressed by _.

swift__swiftFormatEnabled.description: [Swift] Apply swift-format rules from the Swift toolchain.

objc__importStyle.description: [Objective-C] System frameworks use #import <Framework/File.h>; local uses quotes.

objc__nullabilityAnnotations.description: [Objective-C] Require nullable/nonnull annotations on properties and method params.

objc__messageAlignment.description: [Objective-C] Align colons in multi-line message sends.
